metadata.author: ElPi Corp / Perello Consulting
metadata.methodology: 4 dimensions, 87 automated checks, 100 points per dimension
metadata.note: SEO Technical scores updated 2026-03-17 after verification batches 1-3 corrected systematic false negatives (sitemap detection, JSON-LD/Schema.org, HSTS, canonical tags, H1 presence)

scoreChange.reason: noindex confirmed as Trustpilot iframe artifact; Schema.org (WebSite, Organization, FAQPage) confirmed

quickWins.action: Ajouter le schéma Organization + LocalBusiness pour 80+ agences
quickWins.actionEn: Add Organization + LocalBusiness schema for 80+ agencies

quickWins.action: Lancer un blog avec guides d'achat et comparatifs
quickWins.actionEn: Launch a blog with buying guides and comparisons

quickWins.action: Corriger les balises OG (title trop court, apostrophe, Twitter Card)
quickWins.actionEn: Fix OG tags (title length, apostrophe, Twitter Card to summary_large_image)

keyFindings.seoTechnical: Cloudflare CDN, URLs propres, canonicals corrects. Schema.org confirmé (WebSite, Organization, FAQPage). Balises noindex = artefact iframe Trustpilot, pas le head principal.
keyFindings.seoContent: Copywriting commercial solide, FAQ avec schéma FAQPage, Trustpilot 4.5/5. Pas de blog.
keyFindings.email: Multi-ESP (Google, Mandrill, Amazon SES, Salesforce), 4 sélecteurs DKIM. DMARC quarantine.
keyFindings.aiCitation: Schéma FAQPage sur la homepage, propositions de valeur citables. Schéma Organization/LocalBusiness manquant.

keyFindingsEn.seoTechnical: Cloudflare CDN, clean URLs, correct canonicals. Schema.org confirmed (WebSite, Organization, FAQPage). noindex tags are Trustpilot iframe artifacts, not main page head.
keyFindingsEn.seoContent: Strong commercial copywriting, FAQ with FAQPage schema, Trustpilot 4.5/5. No blog.
keyFindingsEn.email: Multi-ESP (Google, Mandrill, Amazon SES, Salesforce), 4 DKIM selectors. DMARC quarantine.
keyFindingsEn.aiCitation: FAQPage schema on homepage, citable value propositions. Organization/LocalBusiness schema missing.

quickWins.action: Ajouter les en-têtes de sécurité sur le sous-domaine www
quickWins.actionEn: Add security headers to www subdomain

quickWins.action: Ajouter le schéma AggregateRating (56 767 avis à 4.5/5)
quickWins.actionEn: Add AggregateRating schema (56,767 reviews at 4.5/5)

quickWins.action: Ajouter le schéma LocalBusiness pour 1 341 pages concessions
quickWins.actionEn: Add LocalBusiness schema for 1,341 dealership pages

keyFindings.seoTechnical: Sitemap massif (40 sous-sitemaps). WebSite JSON-LD confirmé. Meta robots en double, JS lourd. Zéro en-tête de sécurité sur www.
keyFindings.seoContent: Bonne profondeur sur les pages de listing, FAQ 15 questions avec FAQPage. Pas de blog, pas d'auteurs.
keyFindings.email: DMARC p=reject, SPF -all, DKIM RSA 2048-bit. La meilleure infrastructure email du classement.
keyFindings.aiCitation: Schéma Vehicle/Product/FAQ excellent. Pas de LocalBusiness pour 1 341 concessions.

keyFindingsEn.seoTechnical: Massive sitemap (40 sub-sitemaps). WebSite JSON-LD confirmed. Duplicate meta robots, heavy JS. Zero security headers on www.
keyFindingsEn.seoContent: Good depth on listing pages, FAQ 15 questions with FAQPage. No blog, no authors.
keyFindingsEn.email: DMARC p=reject, SPF -all, DKIM RSA 2048-bit. Best email infrastructure in the ranking.
keyFindingsEn.aiCitation: Excellent Vehicle/Product/FAQ schema. No LocalBusiness for 1,341 dealerships.

scoreChange.reason: HSTS with preload confirmed (max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload)

quickWins.action: Corriger l'erreur 500 sur /vehicules-occasion
quickWins.actionEn: Fix the 500 error on /vehicules-occasion

keyFindings.seoTechnical: HSTS avec preload confirmé. Bons sitemaps (3 778 URLs véhicules). Faiblesses de performance et pagination.
keyFindings.seoContent: Meilleur blog du classement : 195 articles, auteur nommé (Cédric Pozas), page auteur dédiée.
keyFindings.email: SPF -all, 3 sélecteurs DKIM (multi-sélecteur), Google Workspace. DMARC p=none.
keyFindings.aiCitation: Zéro JSON-LD malgré le meilleur contenu. FAQ existante sans schéma FAQPage.

keyFindingsEn.seoTechnical: HSTS with preload confirmed. Good sitemaps (3,778 vehicle URLs). Performance and pagination weaknesses.
keyFindingsEn.seoContent: Best blog in the ranking: 195 articles, named author (Cedric Pozas), dedicated author page.
keyFindingsEn.email: SPF -all, 3 DKIM selectors (multi-selector), Google Workspace. DMARC p=none.
keyFindingsEn.aiCitation: Zero JSON-LD despite the best content. Existing FAQ without FAQPage schema.

scoreChange.reason: Sitemap at /sitemap_index.xml confirmed (Yoast), H1 confirmed (Elementor), Yoast schema 4 types confirmed (WebPage, BreadcrumbList, WebSite, SearchAction)

keyFindings.aiCitation: Yoast schema WebSite/BreadcrumbList uniquement. Pas d'Organization/AutoDealer/FAQPage.

keyFindingsEn.seoTechnical: Solid WordPress 6.9.4 + Elementor. Sitemap confirmed (/sitemap_index.xml). H1 present. Yoast schema 4 types. Subdomains fragment authority.

keyFindingsEn.aiCitation: Yoast schema WebSite/BreadcrumbList only. No Organization/AutoDealer/FAQPage.

keyFindings.email: DMARC p=reject (le plus strict), SPF -all, 5 sélecteurs DKIM. Infrastructure email excellente.
keyFindings.aiCitation: AutoDealer via Yoast mais non enrichi. 130+ concessions sans adresse/horaires en schema.

keyFindingsEn.seoTechnical: Sitemap confirmed, Yoast 6-type schema confirmed, canonical present. Canonical points to a promo page (not /).
keyFindingsEn.seoContent: 660 articles in sitemap, some excellent. H1 = legal disclaimer. Partial SPA.
keyFindingsEn.email: DMARC p=reject (strictest), SPF -all, 5 DKIM selectors. Excellent email infrastructure.
keyFindingsEn.aiCitation: AutoDealer via Yoast but not enriched. 130+ dealerships without address/hours in schema.

keyFindings.seoTechnical: Excellents en-têtes de sécurité. Problèmes de pagination (100+ pages). Toutes les affirmations d'audit confirmées.
keyFindings.seoContent: 138 articles, catégories bien organisées, écriture auto de qualité (1 200+ mots). Zéro attribution d'auteur.

keyFindingsEn.seoTechnical: Excellent security headers. Pagination issues (100+ pages). All audit claims confirmed.
keyFindingsEn.seoContent: 138 articles, well-organized categories, quality auto writing (1,200+ words). Zero author attribution.
keyFindingsEn.email: SPF -all but likely exceeding 10 DNS lookups. DMARC p=none. DKIM 1024-bit.
keyFindingsEn.aiCitation: Zero JSON-LD in HTML source despite Nuxt.js framework.
